mapper.sql: select t.id, t.trace_no, t.medical_record_no, t.patient_name, t.patient_sex, t.patient_age, t.hospital_number, t.ward, t.ward_no, t.bed_no, t.apply_dept_id, t.exec_dept_id, t.hospital_date, t.contact_phone, t.contact_address, t.chief_surgeon, t.surgery_date, t.surgery_name, t.admission_diagnosis, t.surgery_id, t.remark, t.order_status, t.audit_date, t.audit_by, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, ad.id as applyDeptId, ad.code as applyDeptCode, ad.name as applyDeptName, ed.id as execDeptId, ed.code as execDeptCode, ed.name as execDeptName from gz_traceability t left join fd_department ad on t.apply_dept_id = ad.id left join fd_department ed on t.exec_dept_id = ed.id
mapper.select: select t.id, t.trace_no, t.medical_record_no, t.patient_name, t.patient_sex, t.patient_age, t.hospital_number, t.ward, t.ward_no, t.bed_no, t.apply_dept_id, t.exec_dept_id, t.hospital_date, t.contact_phone, t.contact_address, t.chief_surgeon, t.surgery_date, t.surgery_name, t.admission_diagnosis, t.surgery_id, t.remark, t.order_status, t.audit_date, t.audit_by, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, ad.id as applyDeptId, ad.code as applyDeptCode, ad.name as applyDeptName, ed.id as execDeptId, ed.code as execDeptCode, ed.name as execDeptName, te.id as entry_id, te.parent_id as entry_parent_id, te.material_id as entry_material_id, te.inventory_id as entry_inventory_id, te.material_name as entry_material_name, te.specification as entry_specification, te.model as entry_model, te.unit as entry_unit, te.quantity as entry_quantity, te.charge_price as entry_charge_price, te.batch_no as entry_batch_no, te.expiry_date as entry_expiry_date, te.master_barcode as entry_master_barcode, te.secondary_barcode as entry_secondary_barcode, te.in_hospital_code as entry_in_hospital_code, te.manufacturer as entry_manufacturer, te.supplier as entry_supplier, te.supplier_id as entry_supplier_id, te.certificate_no as entry_certificate_no, te.billing_follow as entry_billing_follow, te.del_flag as entry_del_flag from gz_traceability t left join fd_department ad on t.apply_dept_id = ad.id left join fd_department ed on t.exec_dept_id = ed.id left join gz_traceability_entry te on te.parent_id = t.id and te.del_flag = '0' where t.id = #{id} and t.del_flag = '0' and t.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(trace_no) from gz_traceability where trace_no like concat(#{prefix},'%') and trace_no like concat('%',#{date},'%') and del_flag = '0' and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_traceability
trace_no, medical_record_no, patient_name, patient_sex, patient_age, hospital_number, ward, ward_no, bed_no, apply_dept_id, exec_dept_id, write_off_dept_id, hospital_date, contact_phone, contact_address, chief_surgeon, surgery_date, surgery_name, admission_diagnosis, surgery_id, remark, order_status, audit_date, audit_by, visit_kind, mirror_row_id, trace_source, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, tenant_id,
#{traceNo}, #{medicalRecordNo}, #{patientName}, #{patientSex}, #{patientAge}, #{hospitalNumber}, #{ward}, #{wardNo}, #{bedNo}, #{applyDeptId}, #{execDeptId}, #{writeOffDeptId}, #{hospitalDate}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactAddress}, #{chiefSurgeon}, #{surgeryDate}, #{surgeryName}, #{admissionDiagnosis}, #{surgeryId}, #{remark}, #{orderStatus}, #{auditDate}, #{auditBy}, #{visitKind}, #{mirrorRowId}, #{traceSource}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{scopedTenantId},
mapper.delete:
update gz_traceability set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_traceability_entry(parent_id, material_id, inventory_id, material_name, specification, model, unit, quantity, charge_price, batch_no, expiry_date, master_barcode, secondary_barcode, in_hospital_code, manufacturer, supplier, supplier_id, certificate_no, billing_follow, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, tenant_id) values
(#{item.parentId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.inventoryId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.model}, #{item.unit}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.chargePrice}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.expiryDate}, #{item.masterBarcode}, #{item.secondaryBarcode}, #{item.inHospitalCode}, #{item.manufacturer}, #{item.supplier}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.certificateNo}, #{item.billingFollow}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.tenantId})
mapper.select:
select t.exec_dept_id as execDeptId, max(ed.name) as execDeptName, te.material_id as mId, max(m.code) as materialCode, max(coalesce(m.name, te.material_name)) as materialName, max(coalesce(m.speci, te.specification)) as materialSpeci, max(coalesce(m.model, te.model)) as materialModel, max(m.register_no) as materialRegisterNo, max(m.period_date) as materialPeriodDate, max(m.is_procure) as materialIsProcure, max(f.factory_name) as factoryName, max(coalesce(fs.name, te.supplier, mfs.name)) as supplierName, sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0)) as quantity, sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0) * ifnull(te.charge_price, 0)) as amount from gz_traceability_entry te left join gz_traceability t on te.parent_id = t.id left join fd_department ed on t.exec_dept_id = ed.id left join fd_material m on te.material_id = m.id left join gz_dep_inventory gdi on te.inventory_id = gdi.id and gdi.del_flag != 1 left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_supplier fs on fs.id = coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id) left join fd_supplier mfs on mfs.id = m.supplier_id left join his_charge_item_mirror hci on hci.tenant_id = t.tenant_id and hci.charge_item_id = m.his_charge_item_id and (hci.deleted_flag is null or hci.deleted_flag != 1) left join gz_depot_inventory gdep on gdep.in_hospital_code = te.in_hospital_code and gdep.batch_no = te.batch_no and IFNULL(gdep.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gdep.tenant_id = t.tenant_id left join fd_warehouse wh_src on wh_src.id = gdep.warehouse_id where te.del_flag = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' and t.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and t.exec_dept_id is not null
and t.order_status = #{orderStatus}
and t.trace_no = #{traceNo}
and te.in_hospital_code like concat('%', #{inHospitalCode}, '%')
and ( m.code like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or m.name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or te.material_name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') )
and ( m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') or te.specification like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') )
and m.factory_id = #{factoryId}
and coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id) = #{supplierId}
and ( fs.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or fs.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or fs.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or te.supplier like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )
and (gdep.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} or wh_src.id = #{warehouseId})
and te.batch_no = #{batchNo} and gdi.material_no like concat('%', #{materialNo}, '%')
and ( coalesce(hci.item_code, m.his_charge_item_id) like concat('%', #{chargeCodeKeyword}, '%') or m.his_charge_item_id like concat('%', #{chargeCodeKeyword}, '%') )
and t.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and t.hospital_number like concat('%', #{hospitalNumber}, '%')
and m.udi_no like concat('%', #{udiKeyword}, '%')
and m.sunshine_code like concat('%', #{sunshineCodeKeyword}, '%')
and m.medical_no like concat('%', #{medicalNoKeyword}, '%')
and m.is_billing = #{isBilling} and m.is_procure = #{isProcure} and m.is_monitor = #{isMonitor} and t.apply_dept_id = #{applyDeptId} and t.exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId} and date(t.create_time) >= #{startDate} and date(t.create_time) <= #{endDate} group by t.exec_dept_id, te.material_id having sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0)) != 0 order by execDeptName, materialCode

select t.apply_dept_id as applyDeptId, max(ad.name) as applyDeptName, te.material_id as mId, max(m.code) as materialCode, max(coalesce(m.name, te.material_name)) as materialName, max(coalesce(m.speci, te.specification)) as materialSpeci, max(coalesce(m.model, te.model)) as materialModel, max(m.register_no) as materialRegisterNo, max(m.period_date) as materialPeriodDate, max(m.is_procure) as materialIsProcure, max(f.factory_name) as factoryName, max(coalesce(fs.name, te.supplier, mfs.name)) as supplierName, sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0)) as quantity, sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0) * ifnull(te.charge_price, 0)) as amount from gz_traceability_entry te left join gz_traceability t on te.parent_id = t.id left join fd_department ad on t.apply_dept_id = ad.id left join fd_material m on te.material_id = m.id left join gz_dep_inventory gdi on te.inventory_id = gdi.id and gdi.del_flag != 1 left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_supplier fs on fs.id = coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id) left join fd_supplier mfs on mfs.id = m.supplier_id left join his_charge_item_mirror hci on hci.tenant_id = t.tenant_id and hci.charge_item_id = m.his_charge_item_id and (hci.deleted_flag is null or hci.deleted_flag != 1) left join gz_depot_inventory gdep on gdep.in_hospital_code = te.in_hospital_code and gdep.batch_no = te.batch_no and IFNULL(gdep.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gdep.tenant_id = t.tenant_id left join fd_warehouse wh_src on wh_src.id = gdep.warehouse_id where te.del_flag = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' and t.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and t.apply_dept_id is not null
and t.order_status = #{orderStatus}
and t.trace_no = #{traceNo}
and te.in_hospital_code like concat('%', #{inHospitalCode}, '%')
and ( m.code like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or m.name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or te.material_name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') )
and ( m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') or te.specification like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') )
and m.factory_id = #{factoryId}
and coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id) = #{supplierId}
and ( fs.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or fs.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or fs.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or te.supplier like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )
and (gdep.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} or wh_src.id = #{warehouseId})
and te.batch_no = #{batchNo} and gdi.material_no like concat('%', #{materialNo}, '%')
and ( coalesce(hci.item_code, m.his_charge_item_id) like concat('%', #{chargeCodeKeyword}, '%') or m.his_charge_item_id like concat('%', #{chargeCodeKeyword}, '%') )
and t.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and t.hospital_number like concat('%', #{hospitalNumber}, '%')
and m.udi_no like concat('%', #{udiKeyword}, '%')
and m.sunshine_code like concat('%', #{sunshineCodeKeyword}, '%')
and m.medical_no like concat('%', #{medicalNoKeyword}, '%')
and m.is_billing = #{isBilling} and m.is_procure = #{isProcure} and m.is_monitor = #{isMonitor} and t.apply_dept_id = #{applyDeptId} and t.exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId} and date(t.create_time) >= #{startDate} and date(t.create_time) <= #{endDate} group by t.apply_dept_id, te.material_id having sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0)) != 0 order by applyDeptName, materialCode

select coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id) as supplierId, max(coalesce(fs.name, te.supplier, mfs.name)) as supplierName, te.material_id as mId, max(m.code) as materialCode, max(coalesce(m.name, te.material_name)) as materialName, max(coalesce(m.speci, te.specification)) as materialSpeci, max(coalesce(m.model, te.model)) as materialModel, max(m.register_no) as materialRegisterNo, max(m.period_date) as materialPeriodDate, max(m.is_procure) as materialIsProcure, max(f.factory_name) as factoryName, sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0)) as quantity, sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0) * ifnull(te.charge_price, 0)) as amount from gz_traceability_entry te left join gz_traceability t on te.parent_id = t.id left join fd_material m on te.material_id = m.id left join gz_dep_inventory gdi on te.inventory_id = gdi.id and gdi.del_flag != 1 left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_supplier fs on fs.id = coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id) left join fd_supplier mfs on mfs.id = m.supplier_id left join his_charge_item_mirror hci on hci.tenant_id = t.tenant_id and hci.charge_item_id = m.his_charge_item_id and (hci.deleted_flag is null or hci.deleted_flag != 1) left join gz_depot_inventory gdep on gdep.in_hospital_code = te.in_hospital_code and gdep.batch_no = te.batch_no and IFNULL(gdep.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gdep.tenant_id = t.tenant_id left join fd_warehouse wh_src on wh_src.id = gdep.warehouse_id where te.del_flag = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' and t.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and ( coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id) is not null or (te.supplier is not null and trim(te.supplier) != '') or fs.name is not null or mfs.name is not null )
and t.order_status = #{orderStatus}
and t.trace_no = #{traceNo}
and te.in_hospital_code like concat('%', #{inHospitalCode}, '%')
and ( m.code like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or m.name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') or te.material_name like concat('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') )
and ( m.speci like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') or te.specification like concat('%', #{materialSpeci}, '%') )
and m.factory_id = #{factoryId}
and coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id) = #{supplierId}
and ( fs.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or fs.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or fs.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or mfs.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or mfs.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or mfs.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or te.supplier like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )
and (gdep.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} or wh_src.id = #{warehouseId})
and te.batch_no = #{batchNo} and gdi.material_no like concat('%', #{materialNo}, '%')
and ( coalesce(hci.item_code, m.his_charge_item_id) like concat('%', #{chargeCodeKeyword}, '%') or m.his_charge_item_id like concat('%', #{chargeCodeKeyword}, '%') )
and t.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and t.hospital_number like concat('%', #{hospitalNumber}, '%')
and m.udi_no like concat('%', #{udiKeyword}, '%')
and m.sunshine_code like concat('%', #{sunshineCodeKeyword}, '%')
and m.medical_no like concat('%', #{medicalNoKeyword}, '%')
and m.is_billing = #{isBilling} and m.is_procure = #{isProcure} and m.is_monitor = #{isMonitor} and t.apply_dept_id = #{applyDeptId} and t.exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId} and date(t.create_time) >= #{startDate} and date(t.create_time) <= #{endDate} group by coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id), case when coalesce(te.supplier_id, gdi.supplier_id, m.supplier_id) is null then coalesce(nullif(trim(te.supplier), ''), nullif(trim(fs.name), ''), nullif(trim(mfs.name), ''), '') else '' end, te.material_id having sum(ifnull(te.quantity, 0)) != 0 order by supplierName, materialCode
